name: CheckSmart
description_short: CheckSmart offers title loans up to $25,000 and express title loans up to $7,500 using vehicle equity as collateral, plus check cashing and money transfer services at multiple Arizona locations.
description_long: CheckSmart is a storefront lending company operating multiple locations across the Phoenix metropolitan area, including Glendale, Mesa, Tempe, and several Phoenix neighborhoods. The company specializes in secured lending products using vehicle titles as collateral, positioning itself as a quick-funding solution for consumers needing emergency cash. CheckSmart's primary loan products are Title Loans (up to $25,000 with clear title required) and Express Title Loans (up to $7,500 using vehicle equity without requiring a clear title). Beyond lending, CheckSmart operates as a financial services hub, offering check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill payment, Green Dot prepaid card issuance, and gift card exchanges. The company emphasizes convenience through online appointment scheduling and rapid lending decisions, with staff available in-store to guide applicants through the approval process. CheckSmart distinguishes itself by accepting vehicle equity even when a clear title is not available (Express Title Loans product), reducing barriers for some borrowers. However, title loans carry significant risks: they require vehicle collateral, typically feature high interest rates (not disclosed on the website), and can result in vehicle repossession if payments are missed. The company's multi-service approach—combining lending, check cashing, and prepaid cards—suggests targeting underbanked or unbanked consumers. For consumers in genuine financial crisis, the speed of funding is a real advantage; for others, the collateral requirement and cost structure present substantial drawbacks.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Express Title Loans available without clear title, reducing documentation barriers
Online appointment scheduling to reduce wait times in-store
High loan amounts available up to $25,000 for title-secured loans
Multiple nearby locations across Phoenix metro area for accessibility
Same-location ancillary services including check cashing, wire transfers, and bill pay
Green Dot prepaid card available in-store for immediate banking access
Extended hours on select days (7:00 PM closings Monday and Friday)
cons: Requires vehicle title as collateral, creating repossession risk if payments missed
Interest rates and APR not disclosed on website, limiting price transparency
Vehicle required for loans; excludes consumers without approved vehicles
Title loan costs typically very high, making this expensive emergency funding
No information about alternative products for borrowers without vehicles
best_for: Vehicle owners facing immediate cash needs who cannot access traditional lending
Consumers with vehicle equity but poor credit history or limited documentation
Individuals needing ancillary services like check cashing alongside emergency funding
Underbanked consumers seeking multiple financial services at one location
diagnosis: CheckSmart is best for vehicle owners in genuine financial emergencies who cannot access bank loans or payday alternatives and need same-day or next-day funding. The critical caveat is that title loans carry substantial risk and cost; borrowers should understand the interest rates (not disclosed on the website), repayment terms, and repossession consequences before proceeding, and should explore payday alternatives or CDFI loans first.
services: Green Dot Visa Debit Card issuance
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1930 W Indian School Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85015
